commands.cmd: fresh isolated pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:check

summary: Added additive append-only meal allocation and private diary persistence. Only explicit eaten/corrected revisions carry immutable sparse nutrient and full provenance snapshots; skipped/deleted revisions carry no consumed totals; corrections never overwrite history; reads and writes enforce fixed private Nutrition permissions; planner, Pantry, cooking and allocation state never automatically become consumption.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Worker exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted before writing; the PM completed the exact bounded package as permitted fallback.
